Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user wants a BPMN like textual model based on the interviews First I need to parse each interview to extract the steps roles decisions and exceptions

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Starting with Marys interview The process begins with receiving an invoice She checks for a PO number If missing she sends it back If present logs into the system forwards to Purchasing Then Purchasing confirms receipt Mary matches invoice to PO If matches goes to Manager for approval If discrepancies emails Purchasing maybe escalates to Rita if unresolved Managers approval triggers payment scheduling

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Dans input confirms that Purchasing checks invoice against PO If discrepancies they contact supplier or hold If PO missing they cant proceed After confirmation it goes to Manager

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Carlos the Manager gets a system notification after Purchasing confirmation He approves or rejects based on suspicious items If approved back to AP for payment scheduling

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Rita the Supervisor handles exceptions If Mary cant match or Purchasing has issues escalated to her She deals with non PO invoices creates retrospective POs or rejects Then back to normal flow

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Karen the Supplier Manager is involved when there are discrepancies She contacts suppliers for missing PO or pricing issues referencing contracts

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Now I need to map these into a BPMN structure Start with Start Event then Receive Invoice Then check for PO Gateway here PO present or not If not loop back to supplier Send Back If present proceed to Log Invoice Then Forward to Purchasing

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Purchasings task Confirm receipt and check against PO Gateway here Discrepancy If yes go to Exception Handling Rita or Karen If no proceed to Manager Approval

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Manager Approval Another gateway for approval If rejected maybe back to AP or Purchasing If approved go to Payment Scheduling

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Exceptions When discrepancies escalate to Rita Rita might involve Karen for supplier issues Then after resolution back to main flow

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Also note that after Manager approval it goes back to AP for payment Need to represent all the flows and gateways clearly Make sure roles are assigned to each task Also mention any data objects like Invoice PO etc

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Need to consolidate conflicting or partial info like when Mary escalates to Rita and Rita might involve Karen Also note that sometimes after discrepancies the invoice is held until corrected

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Check for any loops or rework For example if a discrepancy is found it might go back to the supplier then back to AP Need to capture that as an exception path

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Make sure to include all the roles Mary AP Clerk Dan Purchasing Carlos Manager Rita Supervisor Karen Supplier Manager

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Also the system sends notifications at certain points like when Manager is to approve

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Now structure this into a step by step textual BPMN model using the standard elements events activities gateways flows participants artifacts Mention the alternate paths and exceptions clearly
